meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't collaborate (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Can't Collaborate
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with client collaboration. Use this beginner-friendly checklist to master user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Collaboration friction kills freelance momentum. By implementing automated user onboarding, you eliminate manual setup back-and-forth. Use Antigravity to scaffold the auth flow and Claude Code to handle the integration logic. This creates a seamless, self-service experience that allows clients to onboard themselves instantly, saving you hours of administrative overhead.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the client is waiting, the project is stalled, and you’re stuck in a loop of 'how do I access this?' and 'where is the documentation?' The inability to collaborate effectively isn't just an annoyance; it’s a revenue leak that destroys your reputation as a high-velocity freelancer.

But what if your app could onboard your clients for you? By transforming the onboarding process from a manual hurdle into an automated, intuitive workflow, you regain control of your time. This guide is your blueprint to building a frictionless environment using modern AI-assisted tools.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Define the minimal user journey to reduce friction. Focus on immediate value delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a 3-step user onboarding flow for a SaaS dashboard, focusing on minimizing input fields and maximizing time-to-value.

steps.title: Implementing Secure Authentication
steps.description: Set up a robust auth system that supports role-based access for your clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication module using Supabase, including email magic links and role-based access control.

steps.title: Building the Guided 'First-Run' Experience
steps.description: Create a tour that shows clients how to collaborate inside your app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component for a guided onboarding tour that highlights the collaboration panel.

steps.title: Automating Client Permissions
steps.description: Ensure clients have the right access levels immediately upon onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a database trigger that assigns 'client' permissions to new users automatically upon registration.

steps.title: Deploying the Onboarding Hook
steps.description: Connect the onboarding flow to your main dashboard for seamless transition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration hook that redirects new users to the 'collaboration-hub' after onboarding completion.

pro_tips: Use 'Magic Links' instead of passwords to reduce support tickets by 80%.
Pre-populate the client's dashboard with demo data so they see value before they input their own.
Instrument your onboarding flow with post-hog events to identify exactly where users drop off.
Always include a 'Request Help' button within the onboarding tour to keep communication inside the app.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth flow specifically to ensure no edge cases break access.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, run a 'stress test' by inviting a test user to perform every action in your collaboration suite to ensure permission parity.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for your clients' success. By automating the friction out of your workflow, you unlock the ability to scale your freelance business without scaling your stress. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
